description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Automated Test Build that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow has two jobs: build-windows and build-linux. The build-windows job runs on a Windows environment with a matrix strategy for different Windows versions (2019, 2022) and audio libraries (miniaudio, irrklang). It checks out the repository, updates submodules, downloads and extracts various dependencies (premake, libevent, freetype, lua, sqlite, miniaudio, ogg, opus, opusfile, vorbis, irrKlang), and builds the solution using premake and MSBuild. The build-linux job runs on a Linux environment with a matrix strategy for different Linux distributions (ubuntu-22, ubuntu-24, ubuntu-static-link). It checks out the repository, updates submodules, installs dependencies, downloads and extracts premake and other dependencies, and builds the solution.
